message:
feat(core): add dedicated TryFrom<Value> for Vec<f64>

Adds a specialized TryFrom<Value> impl for Vec<f64> that extracts a
Value::Array of doubles into a typed Rust Vec. This complements the
existing generic Vec<T> TryFrom impl by providing a concrete
specialization for f64, which avoids ambiguity when the compiler
cannot infer T from context (e.g., when extracting float arrays from
query results without explicit type annotation).

Returns TypeError with expected="ARRAY" on non-array input, consistent
with the existing Vec<String>, Vec<i32>, Vec<i64>, and Vec<bool> impls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
